KnodePackage.title: KnodePackage
KnodePackage.description: A structured slides package containing slide mappings, speaker scripts, visual prompts, and glossary.

glossary.description: List of key glossary terms and short descriptions

slides.description: Structured slide mappings with slideNumber, title, visualPrompt, bulletPoints, and script

userId.description: The UID of the owning user
